message:
Merge PR #2899: fix: filter git worktrees from agent bead identity scans (#2767)

Crew/polecat directory scanners now skip worktrees (where .git is a file)
to avoid creating spurious agent beads for branch checkouts.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2899
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
